place: Chaweng, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Earthy One-Storey Three-Bedroom Pool Villa - Chaweng
blurb: A serene single-storey island residence on Koh Samui, designed in calm, natural tones — one of a boutique development of five villas wrapped in stone and warm wood, with panoramic glazing that dissolves the line between the living spaces and a private pool. Three en-suite bedrooms across 297 m² on a 566 m² plot. 30-year leasehold, from ฿10,200,000.
detail:
Conceived as a serene island residence, this single-storey villa is one of a boutique development of just five homes on Koh Samui, designed in calm and natural tones for a refined tropical-island lifestyle.

The architecture embraces materials close to nature — stone and warm wood, soft neutral palettes and natural textures — for a gentle connection between the island environment and the living space. Expansive panoramic glazing fills the interior with daylight and frames a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor areas: open-plan living, dining and kitchen flow out to a covered sala, a terrace and a private swimming pool set among tropical planting.

The three-bedroom layout runs to 296.81 m² of total build (118.50 m² enclosed living) on a 565.50 m² plot, with three en-suite bedrooms, a laundry and powder room, and a private car park. The wider development also includes a larger four-bedroom villa of 378.90 m² on an 858 m² plot for those who need more space.

Quietly balanced and full of light, it is a home designed for comfort, presence and naturalness — ideal as a full-time island base or a low-maintenance holiday home. Offered on a 30-year leasehold from ฿10,200,000.
